title: Delegation Framework
rule: Permanent or unlimited delegation is prohibited. Every delegation must be bounded on every dimension.

requiredDimensions.duration: A finite TTL; no permanent grants.
requiredDimensions.spendingLimits: A capped economic envelope; assets remain the sponsor's.
requiredDimensions.informationAccessLimits: A disclosure class bounding what the agent may read.
requiredDimensions.operationalDomains: The surfaces/cartridges the agent may act within.

envelope.expansionForbidden: No conversation or agent action may expand the envelope.
